prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-BEARKNIFE-BLACK-2 Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 13" Wildlife Collection Animal Head Fixed Blade Hunting Knife, Howling Bear Description: Add some majestic wildlife to your blade collection with the ASR Outdoor Etched Knife Dagger.

This unique knife is constructed of durable 440 stainless steel that won't rust. It measures 12.5" in length with an overall length of 14", making it an ideal knife for display. The ergonomic handle features a majestic howling bear, and the blade comes with an etched sheath that displays a matching wildlife scene for an authentic look.

Although these knives are meant for display, the durable blade can be sharpened for use and the sheath will protect it during inclement weather. This is a must-have addition to any knife enthusiast's collection. Search Terms: collectable authentic steel blade outdoorsman bear scabbard hunting dagger knife collectors ornate knives etched design with sheath Features: - BOWIE-STYLE FIXED BLADE HUNTING KNIFE: Large decorative sheathed knife with cross-guard featuring a clip point; excellent presentation gift for knife collectors and hunting enthusiasts - ORNAMENTAL POMMEL AND SHEATH: From tip to pommel a matching wild animal outdoor graphic adorns this stainless steel knife in full color that will surly impress one and all. Each fixed blade animal head knife has a 5.5" handle with a solid ornamental animal head pommel full color graphic scabbard and handle - Inspired by outdoor wildlife and the spirit of America - DISPLAY SIZE: Sheathed length: 14 inches; Knife length: 13.5 inches; Blade length: 8 inches; Ideal size for mantle display or behind glass in a showcase - MAKES A GREAT GIFT: Whether for a special occasion or just to show you care these collectible and functional knives are a wonderful present idea === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 13" Black Bear Howling Fixed Blade Hunting Knife
